AstoriCrypto is a niche trading agency with a focus on retail grade crypto and blockchain investment.
  • No Upfront Payments

Start Trading

About Us

We provide expert market analysis and strategic investment insights. We don't try to over complicate our primary objective of building wealth for our clients in a clear risk framework.

Doubt always accompanies mankind’s greatest innovations. To move ahead of the pack, to challenge common-practice you must be bold. 

Our team specializes in identifying high-potential projects, assessing risks, and optimizing portfolios for long-term success. Join AstoriCrypto as we navigate the future of digital assets together.

Join AstoriCrypto© Group and Navigate the Emerging Crypto Market

AstoriCrypto is an investment advisor specialising in Crypto Assets. We are focused on creating sensible investment products to drive value for our clients.

 01. No Upfront Payments

We will never ask for any upfront fees or payments to join the group. If a crypto mentor requires upfront fees, it may indicate a lack of confidence in their analysis or an attempt to sell a course.

02. Full Control of Your Wallet

You will always maintain full control of your wallet and trades. I will never ask for access to your wallet or request funds to invest on your behalf. All premium members are responsible for placing their own trades manually.

03. Profit-Based Fee Structure

Once your portfolio has doubled in value, you will send us 10% of your profits at the end of each month. This ensures that my success is tied to your success. Failure to pay this fee will result in a permanent ban from the group.

Join Astori 

Extra Informations

Starting Investment:

A minimum of $5,000 is suggested for sustainable returns. Trust Wallet is commonly used by members.

Coin Research & Selection

All recommended coins are backed by thorough research, focusing on established altcoins in AI, RWA, GameFi, DeFi, and DePIN.

Free Mentorship

New to crypto? I offer free one on-one mentorship with limited slots available.

Converting Crypto

Convert BTC​ or any crypto to ETH for smoother trading.

Risk Management

I recommend investing only 5-10% of your portfolio per trade. Adjust risk as profits grow.

Start living life to the fullest

As a crypto advisor, my lifestyle reflects the rewards of strategic investing, showing what’s possible when financial goals become reality.
